note: 10 条 pilot draft 的可接受语序集合（人工逐句审定，Claude 亲撰）。这批句子全部是 V + 直接宾语 + 介词短语论元 的固定结构（compare X with Y / provide X with Y / supply X with Y / remind X of Y / congratulate X on Y / introduce X to Y / divide X into Y / base X on Y / transform X into Y / attribute X to Y）——PP 为论元不可前置、宾语较轻不可重 NP 移位，故每句 genuinely acceptable 的语序只有 canonical 一种；诚实起见 acceptedSequences 仅含 canonical，绝不添加会导致错误判对的假等价语序。canonical 非官方 TOEFL 答案（official:false）。sequences 以 chunk 下标表示（下标对应 DB choices id）。

entries.sentence: My aunt compared the new phone with her old one.
entries.why_single: compare X with Y：with-PP 为论元，不可前置或后移

entries.sentence: The waiter provided the guests with fresh towels.
entries.why_single: provide X with Y：论元 PP 固定语序

entries.sentence: The farmer supplied the village with fresh milk.
entries.why_single: supply X with Y：论元 PP 固定语序

entries.sentence: The teacher reminded the students of the deadline.
entries.why_single: remind X of Y：of-PP 为论元，不可移位

entries.sentence: The manager congratulated the team on their success.
entries.why_single: congratulate X on Y：on-PP 为论元，不可移位

entries.sentence: The guide introduced the tourists to the old town.
entries.why_single: introduce X to Y：to-PP 为论元；宾语轻，不可重 NP 移位

entries.sentence: The coach divided the players into two teams.
entries.why_single: divide X into Y：into-PP 为论元，不可移位

entries.sentence: The judge based her decision on the evidence.
entries.why_single: base X on Y：on-PP 为论元，不可移位

entries.sentence: The committee transformed the empty hall into a library.
entries.why_single: transform X into Y：into-PP 为论元，不可移位

entries.sentence: The article attributed the delay to bad weather.
entries.why_single: attribute X to Y：to-PP 为论元，不可移位
